Violates Constitution 'one organism, five faces' principle.", "recommended_fix": "Reframe as 'Atlas: Five Faces of Verified Growth' with subheader naming all five skills."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "memory/swarm/skills/communications-strategist.md", "issue": "Draft PR release uses 'VOLAURA platform' repeatedly without mentioning MindShift or BrandedBy. Creates product silo perception.", "recommended_fix": "Use 'Atlas ecosystem' as root noun; position products as specialized expressions."}, {"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "docs/", "issue": "ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md enforces Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) but MindShift is the only product implementing it. findings.issue: Landing page headline reads 'VOLAURA: Verified Talent. No Guesswork.' — positions VOLAURA as standalone product, erases MindShift, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, ZEUS. Violates Constitution 'one organism, five faces' principle.
findings.recommended_fix: Reframe as 'Atlas: Five Faces of Verified Growth' with subheader naming all five skills.

findings.issue: Draft PR release uses 'VOLAURA platform' repeatedly without mentioning MindShift or BrandedBy. Creates product silo perception.
findings.recommended_fix: Use 'Atlas ecosystem' as root noun; position products as specialized expressions.

findings.issue: ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md enforces Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) but MindShift is the only product implementing it. Others lack adaptive UI/response energy scaling. Violates Foundation Law 2.
findings.recommended_fix: Audit all product UIs for Energy Adaptation; implement context-aware energy levels in Atlas, BrandedBy, ZEUS, Life Simulator.

whistleblower_flag: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is violated across 4/5 products. Foundation Law non-compliance at ecosystem scale.
